use_case: FB-D-03/04 — post-rerank quote drift: the LLM emits a citation whose quote_or_value is NOT a substring of the cited chunk's full text (e.g. 'low-intensity statin' when the chunk says 'high-intensity statin'). The rule MUST reject the case so verifyClinicalBlocks knows to drop the claim. Fixture pre-rejected on purpose: every quote_or_value below appears in source_text, demonstrating the rule's pass branch holds for legitimate citations. The drift detection itself is exercised in the unit test (test/eval/citation_quote_in_source.test.ts).

context.source_text: In adults with diabetes mellitus aged 18 or older, treatment should be initiated at SBP 140 mm Hg. Adults with diabetes and elevated LDL benefit from high-intensity statin therapy.
